This device is now part of the network, which helps owners securely find their lost items. Set a PIN, pattern, or password to locate your items with the network.
For added security, set a PIN, pattern, or password for this device.
For storing photos, videos, music and more
Identity Check works with more apps
Identity Check prevents unwanted access to your apps. Now available with any app that uses Fingerprint or Face Unlock.
